description: Trigger-accuracy queries for the eight highest-collision skill clusters. Each query is labeled with the skill that SHOULD trigger, or null if no skill in the cluster should trigger (near-miss queries). Queries follow agentskills.io guidance: realistic phrasing, casual wording, file paths, and occasional typos.

pass_criteria.should_trigger: expected skill invoked in > 0.5 of runs
pass_criteria.should_not_trigger: no cluster skill invoked in >= 0.5 of runs (i.e. cluster trigger rate < 0.5)
